title: Croation Pastry Tart
description: A flaky pastry crust filled with a sweet and tangy croation cream. Perfect for a dessert or snack.
instructions: Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
Trim the edges and press the dough into the corners of the pan.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the croation cream, lemon zest, and granulated sugar.
Pour the cream mixture into the pastry-lined tart pan.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool to room temperature.
Drizzle with melted butter before serving.
